name: autobiography-of-mlk
description: Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s 'The Autobiography of Martin Luther King, Jr.' — his life story in his own words, edited by Clayborne Carson, covering the Civil Rights Movement, nonviolence, and his enduring vision of justice.
useCase: Understand the Civil Rights Movement, MLK's philosophy of nonviolence, key speeches and writings, and apply his leadership lessons today.
knownRisks: Compiled from MLK's writings — not an autobiography in the traditional sense, a composite work
Covers complex historical events — some simplification inevitable in a skill format
MLK's legacy is complex — scholars differ on aspects of his politics and philosophy
